title: Joleobban
synopsis:
Among Choi Jeong-woo's art school classmates, none stand out as much as Shin Joo-hee. Her work is universally praised, and her beauty and untouchable aura make her beloved by her male peers and envied by her female peers.

Jeong-woo is shocked when he accidentally discovers that Joo-hee is working as a high-class hostess at a club, but vows to keep it a secret. His feelings for Joo-hee deepen as he becomes closer to her and sees how hard she works for her dreams. However, when one of their less scrupulous classmates discovers her secret as well, it kicks off a series of events that will complicate both Joo-hee's life and Jeong-woo's image of her forever.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]
